description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring seven visible floors. The facade is characterized by a repetitive arrangement of rectangular windows, each floor having a consistent window pattern, and horizontal bands that separate the stories. Balconies or overhangs are present on some sides, providing visual depth and shadow. The ground floor includes a main entrance, which appears as a single door, and additional window openings. The exterior is finished in a uniform, muted color, giving the building a utilitarian and modern appearance, with no visible signage or decorative elements.
description: A seven-story, rectangular office building with repetitive windows, flat roof, and a simple, modern facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, prominent balconies, and a regular window pattern across all floors.
description_view_1: Side view with a single door at the base, consistent window rows, and less pronounced balconies.
description_view_2: Rear view with only windows visible, no entrance or balconies, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a recessed ground floor area and regular window arrangement, similar to the front but without a visible entrance.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontally aligned, evenly spaced rectangular windows in a repetitive grid pattern on each floor.
